codespace.COMMENT: Table to store the gml:identifier and gml:name codespace information. Mapping file: mapping/core/Codespace.hbm.xml

compositeobservation.COMMENT: Relation table for complex parent/child observations

compositephenomenon.COMMENT: Relation table to store observableProperty hierarchies, aka compositePhenomenon. E.g. define a parent in a query and all childs are also contained in the response. Mapping file: mapping/transactional/TObservableProperty.hbm.xml

featureofinteresttype.COMMENT: Table to store the FeatureOfInterestType information. Mapping file: mapping/core/FeatureOfInterestType.hbm.xml

featureparameter.COMMENT: Table to store additional featureOfInterest information (sf:parameter). Mapping file: mapping/core/FeatureParameter.hbm.xml

featurerelation.COMMENT: Relation table to store feature hierarchies. E.g. define a parent in a query and all childs are also contained in the response. Mapping file: mapping/transactional/TFeatureOfInterest.hbm.xml

CHECKS: (disabled = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
(hiddenchild = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
observableproperty.COMMENT: Table to store the ObservedProperty/Phenomenon information. Mapping file: mapping/core/ObservableProperty.hbm.xml

CHECKS: (child = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
(deleted = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))

(hiddenchild = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
observationconstellation.COMMENT: Table to store the ObservationConstellation information. Contains information about the constellation of observableProperty, procedure, offering and the observationType. Mapping file: mapping/core/ObservationConstellation.hbm.xml

observationtype.COMMENT: Table to store the observationTypes. Mapping file: mapping/core/ObservationType.hbm.xml

CHECKS: (disabled = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
offering.COMMENT: Table to store the offering information. Mapping file: mapping/core/Offering.hbm.xml

offeringallowedfeaturetype.COMMENT: Table to store relations between offering and allowed featureOfInterestTypes, defined in InsertSensor request. Mapping file: mapping/transactional/TOffering.hbm.xml

offeringallowedobservationtype.COMMENT: Table to store relations between offering and allowed observationTypes, defined in InsertSensor request. Mapping file: mapping/transactional/TOffering.hbm.xml

offeringhasrelatedfeature.COMMENT: Table to store relations between offering and associated relatedFeatures. Mapping file: mapping/transactional/TOffering.hbm.xml

offeringrelation.COMMENT: Relation table to store offering hierarchies. E.g. define a parent in a query and all childs are also contained in the response. Mapping file: mapping/core/Offering.hbm.xml

parameter.COMMENT: Table to store additional obervation information (om:parameter). Mapping file: mapping/core/Parameter.hbm.xml

CHECKS: (deleted = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
(disabled = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
(insitu = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
(isaggregation = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
(istype = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
(mobile = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
(referenceflag = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
procedure.COMMENT: Table to store the procedure/sensor. Mapping file: mapping/core/Procedure.hbm.xml

proceduredescriptionformat.COMMENT: Table to store the ProcedureDescriptionFormat information of procedures. Mapping file: mapping/core/ProcedureDescriptionFormat.hbm.xml

profileobservation.COMMENT: Relation table for complex parent/child observations

relatedfeature.COMMENT: Table to store related feature information used in the OGC SOS 2.0 Capabilities (See also OGC SWES 2.0). Mapping file: mapping/transactionl/RelatedFeature.hbm.xml

relatedfeaturehasrole.COMMENT: Relation table to store relatedFeatures and their associated relatedFeatureRoles. Mapping file: mapping/transactionl/RelatedFeature.hbm.xml

relatedfeaturerole.COMMENT: Table to store related feature role information used in the OGC SOS 2.0 Capabilities (See also OGC SWES 2.0). Mapping file: mapping/transactionl/RelatedFeatureRole.hbm.xml

relatedobservation.COMMENT: The related observation of an observation.

resulttemplate.COMMENT: Table to store resultTemplates (OGC SOS 2.0 result handling profile). Mapping file: mapping/transactionl/ResultTemplate.hbm.xml

sensorsystem.COMMENT: Relation table to store procedure hierarchies. E.g. define a parent in a query and all childs are also contained in the response. Mapping file: mapping/transactional/TProcedure.hbm.xml

CHECKS: (deleted = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
(hiddenchild = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
(published = ANY(ARRAY[CAST('T' AS bpchar), CAST('F' AS bpchar)]))
series.COMMENT: Table to store a (time-) series which consists of featureOfInterest, observableProperty, and procedure. Mapping file: mapping/series/Series.hbm.xml

unit.COMMENT: Table to store the unit of measure information, used in observations. Mapping file: mapping/core/Unit.hbm.xml

validproceduretime.COMMENT: Table to store procedure descriptions which were inserted or updated via the transactional Profile. Mapping file: mapping/transactionl/ValidProcedureTime.hbm.xml
